pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh confirms the data is synthetically generated via a Rescorla-Wagner RL model.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Probabilistic Reversal Learning data built dynamically via a python script in setup_task.sh. It generates 18 valid participants using a Rescorla-Wagner RL model with soft-max choice logic and 80/20 probabilistic contingencies. It also intentionally injects one corrupted participant ('PRL-999') who strictly alternates choices (A, B, A, B) regardless of feedback, mathematically guaranteeing a Win-Stay rate of 0.0. The expected output report path is /home/ga/pebl/analysis/reversal_report.json.
